layers.name: Project Midas BVR(I)
layers.description: Deep multicolor photometry joined to Gaia and catalog flags (m34_join.csv). Hover for P(member), Excel class, WOCS/Malofeeva flags.

layers.name: Jones & Prosser (1996)
layers.description: Proper-motion membership from photographic astrometry (224 non-zero membership codes shown).

layers.name: Gaia DR3 field
layers.description: Gaia DR3 sources with G < 18 in a 0.35° cone (15,211 stars). Sample of 900 shown.

layers.name: Cantat-Gaudin & Anders (2020)
layers.description: UPMASK membership probabilities for NGC 1039 (M34) from Gaia DR2 — VizieR J/A+A/640/A1 (555 members).

layers.name: Malofeeva et al. (2023)
layers.description: IR two-index binary-sensitive sample for NGC 1039 — Gaia+WISE pseudocolors (AJ 165, 45; 553 stars).

layers.name: WOCS / Meibom et al. (2011)
layers.description: Rotation periods, radial velocities, and membership for 120 VizieR targets in the M34 field (ApJ 733, 115). 118 overlap Midas photometry; parent survey monitored 5,656 V-band light curves.

published.name: WOCS full light-curve archive
published.note: Complete differential V-band time series (12 ≲ V ≲ 20.8) from Meibom+ (2011) are not on VizieR; only the 120 rotation/RV targets are mapped above.
